shots.name: 01-boot
shots.title: Boot sequence
shots.subtitle: One real-time feed for Twitch, X, and Kick.

shots.name: 02-live-feed
shots.title: Live command center
shots.subtitle: Twitch chat and X filtered-stream posts flow with source labels.

shots.name: 03-proof-inspector
shots.title: Raw provenance
shots.subtitle: Selecting a row exposes the normalized source payload and live receipt.

shots.name: 04-search-filter
shots.title: Search + source filter
shots.subtitle: Keyboard-first filtering highlights the signal without losing context.

shots.name: 05-author-drilldown
shots.title: Author drill-down
shots.subtitle: Click any author to isolate their messages, then Esc clears the view.

shots.name: 06-watchlist
shots.title: Watchlist alerts
shots.subtitle: Terms flag matching rows and raise toasts for fast moderation.

shots.name: 07-volume-theme
shots.title: Volume + heat rail
shots.subtitle: The tape, radar, and heat meters surface bursts before the room scrolls past.

shots.name: 08-setup-honesty
shots.title: Setup honesty
shots.subtitle: The drawer shows real source status and sanitized credential checks, never secrets.

shots.name: 09-overlay-config
shots.title: OBS overlay builder
shots.subtitle: Resize, fade, align, and filter the browser-source overlay live.

shots.name: 10-recap-close
shots.title: Recap + close
shots.subtitle: Bubblewire captures the moment, the proof, and the broadcast.
